'''Womrik''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Womrik system/Legends|Womrik system]] in the [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvian sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], near [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]]. The sights of its ice-capped mountain peaks, which were second to none, attracted many tourists and were a source of pride the planet's inhabitants.

[[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] used it as a location for [[Peregrine's Nest]].

==Behind the scenes==
When asked about the number of bases they had used [[Sena Leikvold Midanyl|Sena]] replied the current one was "Fourteenth..." "...That's if you count Womrik and the [[Mattri asteroid base|Mattri]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] bases." However, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] later doubted the accuracy of those statements when he realized how permanent a structure Peregrine's Nest had become. There may never have, in fact, existed such a base as the one she spoke of, or even the location.

The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Dufilvan sector (a misspelling of the true [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvian sector]]) and, consequently, Womrik, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
